title: peganum harmala var. stenophyllum
intro: Peganum harmala var. stenophyllum, also known as Syrian rue or dureh, is a plant-based substance obtained from the seeds of the Peganum harmala plant. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, which can help to reduce stress and promote overall well-being. The health benefits of Peganum harmala var. stenophyllum include its potential to alleviate symptoms of anxiety and depression, improve sleep quality, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the seeds are often dried and powdered, then used in teas, capsules, or tinctures, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential interactions.
